Locale.interface_language_hint: Changes the language of the navbar, sidebar, and settings. Translation of feeds and other content is rolling out gradually.

Widgets.fear_greed_text: Tracks market sentiment from 0 (extreme fear) to 100 (extreme greed). Crypto reading is from Alternative.me; stocks from CNN. Often used as a contrarian signal — extremes can mark turning points.
Widgets.market_prices_text: Live prices and 24h change for the assets in your watchlist. Tap the pencil to add stocks, crypto, indices or commodities — up to 10.
Widgets.top_movers_text: Biggest 24h gainers and losers in your selected market — crypto, stocks or forex. Useful for spotting unusual moves and idea generation.
Widgets.most_analyzed_text: Tickers most discussed by the community in posts and analyses over your selected window. The bar shows the bull / neutral / bear split, and the arrow shows whether activity is rising or falling vs. the previous period.
Widgets.people_to_follow_text: A small selection of community members suggested to you — active or verified analysts you might find worth following.
Widgets.currencies_text: Live exchange rates for the currencies you track, expressed per 1 unit of your base currency. Tap the pencil to change the base or add up to 10 currencies. Sourced from open exchange-rate data, refreshed every few minutes.
Widgets.market_hours_text: Shows whether each major exchange (Stocks) or forex session is currently open or closed, with countdowns to the next open or close. Times follow each region's local market hours and DST.
Widgets.sponsored_text: Promoted offers from verified brands — brokers, courses, tools and other partners. We only show ads that pass our review for compliance and disclosure. Tap the X to hide an ad you don't want to see again.

Portfolio.title: My Portfolio
Portfolio.reset_confirm: Remove ALL holdings? This cannot be undone.
Portfolio.empty_body: Build your real portfolio by adding stocks, ETFs, crypto, bonds or cash. We'll show concentration, sector mix, asset class split and a rough risk read — purely educational, no buy/sell advice.
Portfolio.concentration_flag: {symbol} is {pct}% of your portfolio — single-name concentration above 25% materially raises idiosyncratic risk.
Portfolio.asset_class_text: Risky weight (stocks + ETFs + crypto) is {pct}%. Conservative <30%, Balanced 30–65%, Aggressive 65–85%, Speculative ≥85%.
Portfolio.vol_text: Weighted average of class-level volatility (cash 0%, bonds 5%, ETFs 14%, stocks 20%, crypto 70%). This ignores correlation between holdings and is a rough read, not a forecast.
Portfolio.disclaimer_bold: Educational analysis only — not financial advice.
Portfolio.disclaimer_text: Peerza.ai is not a registered investment advisor. Risk metrics are simplified illustrations, not forecasts. Consult a qualified professional before making investment decisions.
Portfolio.intro_body_part1: Add the stocks, ETFs, crypto, bonds and cash you actually own — manually or by ticker search. We'll show you what your portfolio looks like, where the risk sits, and how diversified you are.
Portfolio.intro_bullet_concentration_text: Top holdings as % of portfolio — single-name risk flagged above 25%.
Portfolio.intro_bullet_mix_text: See how you're spread across sectors, asset classes, and risk bands.
Portfolio.intro_bullet_vol_text: A rough annualized σ — class-weighted, with the simplification disclosed.
Portfolio.intro_bullet_advice_text: We're not a registered investment advisor. Always do your own research.
Portfolio.dlg_search_placeholder: Search ticker or name — AAPL, BTC, VOO…
Portfolio.dlg_cost_invalid: Cost must be a non-negative number

Auth.tagline: The first financial social media platform
Auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your Peerza.ai account
Auth.login_demo_hint: Click to try the demo account — fills the form for you
Auth.login_terms_prefix: By signing in you agree to our
Auth.register_age_hint: You must be 13 or older to join.
Auth.register_recovery_hint: Used if you ever forget your password. Pick something only you would know.
Auth.register_err_dob: Please pick your full date of birth
Auth.register_terms_prefix: By creating an account you agree to our
Auth.forgot_subtitle_identify: Enter your email or username — we'll ask the security question you set up.
Auth.forgot_subtitle_verify: Answer your security question to set a new password.
Auth.forgot_answer_placeholder: Type the answer you set up
Auth.forgot_err_short_password: New password must be at least 8 characters.
